expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: modern grid hyperlink-style coverage separates contextual-link styling from ordinary element rendering
expectations.evidence: result.md notes the requirement exists in the Jira description, but also states there is “no Phase 4a output draft artifact … to demonstrate compliance” and concludes “Not satisfied with provided evidence.” The output does not actually provide Phase 4a scenario content explicitly separating contextual-link styling vs ordinary rendering; it only describes that such coverage would be needed.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md: “No Phase 4a run artifacts were provided… Without Phase 4a draft content, the benchmark expectation ‘Output aligns with primary phase phase4a’ … cannot be demonstrated.” result.md similarly says there is “no Phase 4a output draft … to evaluate,” so alignment cannot be shown.
